title: Gap Closure, Deliberate Practice, and Honest Positioning · Opportunity Brief: Smallest Evidence Task
summary: The role matrix exposes a few high-value gaps, but the candidate starts another broad course instead of testing whether each gap blocks real work. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the smallest evidence task increment in time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
Prioritize gaps by role frequency, task centrality, transfer distance, evidence weakness, learning cost, and application timing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Smallest Evidence Task · Theory Smallest Evidence Task
steps.instruction:

The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

options.text: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Watching an explanation is enough to close a performance gap. That claim fails the predict smallest evidence task evidence boundary for Smallest Evidence Task.

For predict smallest evidence task, apply Smallest Evidence Task without its stated preconditions, omit the time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Smallest Evidence Task for time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.text: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Smallest Evidence Task while producing time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case. A defensible solution applies Smallest Evidence Task, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-smallest-evidence-task — Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-smallest-evidence-task
decision-evidence: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Watching an explanation is enough to close a performance gap. This fails the Smallest Evidence Task contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: FTC Job Scam Consumer Alert (Published 2025-07-10; reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls recruiter identity verification, premature sensitive-data requests, payment and equipment-check fraud, urgency signals, and independent employer-channel confirmation.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design the smallest authentic task that can reveal or improve one missing behavior under a changed case.
